rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ALFRED JOHN O'CONNOR
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer, Demurrer To Amended Will Contest, And Memorandum In Support Of Demurrer To Amended Will Contest
rulings.Rulings: Sustained with leave to amend as to the third cause of action to plead facts supporting the applicability of Probate Code sections 21362 and 21366. Overruled as to the first cause of action because, as respondent concedes, contestant has standing at least as to some issues concerning validity of will, and a demurrer cannot attack only a portion of a cause of action. Overruled as to the fifth cause of action because contestant has adequately pleaded inconsistency, her allegations must be liberally construed in the light most favorable to her claims, and factual disagreements or disagreements cannot be resolved on demurrer. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the hearing must so advise opposing parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:30 p.m. Wednesday, September 18, 2013.
